known_ip_details.label: Sitemap Crawler (weekly, replaced 202.8.43.0)
known_ip_details.evidence: Same ~1,450 requests/week pattern starting Feb 9. Took over from 202.8.43.0. Same crawl signature.

known_ip_details.label: Web Designer (primary)
known_ip_details.evidence: 14,137 requests over 17 days (peak 3,316 on Feb 2). Mac/Firefox user. Divi Builder activity (?et_fb=1&et_bfb=1). Heavy wp-admin/wp-login access with 200/302 responses.

known_ip_details.label: Vulnerability Scanner A
known_ip_details.evidence: 8,981 requests over 12 days (peak 1,785 on Feb 25). Probing /wp-includes/ID3, /vendor/phpunit, /manager.php, /bless.php. Windows/Chrome UA but attack-pattern paths.

known_ip_details.label: Content Manager
known_ip_details.evidence: 6,935 requests over 48 active days. Windows/Chrome user. Consistent daily presence with periodic editing spikes (peak 997 on Feb 19). Pattern matches regular content updates.

known_ip_details.label: 160 attack-path probes (1.7% of requests)
known_ip_details.evidence: 160 attack-path probes (1.7% of requests)

known_ip_details.label: Curl Scanner
known_ip_details.evidence: 4,368 requests over 6 days (peak 1,665 on Mar 3). UA is 'curl/8.7.1'. Automated scanning tool.

known_ip_details.label: Vulnerability Scanner B
known_ip_details.evidence: 6,645 requests over 11 days (peak 1,525 on Feb 27). Probing /.well-known/index.php, /manager.php, /bless.php, /O-Simple.php. Windows/Firefox UA but attack-pattern paths.

known_ip_details.label: Sitemap Crawler (weekly)
known_ip_details.evidence: ~1,453 requests/week, every Sunday for 5 weeks. Hits /sitemap_index.xml, /robots.txt, then crawls entire site. Automated, not organic.

known_ip_details.label: 113 attack-path probes (1.6% of requests)
known_ip_details.evidence: 113 attack-path probes (1.6% of requests)

known_ip_details.label: Hosting Server (cron/monitoring)
known_ip_details.evidence: 3,431 requests over all 59 days. Perfectly steady ~55-60/day. WordPress self-pings (wp-cron.php), internal monitoring. IP belongs to 1&1/IONOS hosting infrastructure.

known_ip_details.label: Vulnerability Scanner C
known_ip_details.evidence: 4,563 requests over 5 days (peak 2,308 on Feb 2). Probing /.well-known/index.php, /wp-includes/ID3, /manager.php. Burst scan pattern.

known_ip_details.label: 82 attack-path probes (1.8% of requests)
known_ip_details.evidence: 82 attack-path probes (1.8% of requests)

known_ip_details.label: Vulnerability Scanner E
known_ip_details.evidence: 4,179 requests over 3 days (peak 3,024 on Feb 10). Probing /wp-content/uploads, /wp-content/plugins, /wp-includes. Directory enumeration pattern.

known_ip_details.label: Web Designer (secondary)
known_ip_details.evidence: 3,983 requests over 4 days (peak 2,020 on Feb 7). Mac/Firefox user. Heavy Divi Builder + about-us page editing. Burst pattern matches design work sessions.
